debug_info.goal:
m : ℕ
S : List (Call m)
hyp :
  ¬∀ c ∈ S,
      isAgentFinalCall m S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentFinalCall m S c.2 c = true ∨
        ¬(isAgentFinalCall m S c.1 c = true ∧ isAgentFinalCall m S c.2 c = true)
⊢ False

proof:
simp only [not_forall, not_or] at hyp
    obtain ⟨c, _, ⟨h1, h2⟩⟩ := hyp
    exact h2 h1
